title: Finding Relief: 9 Herbal Creams for Elderly with Upper Abdominal Pain
description: Cinchona officinalis creams are a natural remedy that can help alleviate upper abdominal pain. The creams contain quinine, a compound derived from the Cinchona tree, which has anti-inflammatory properties that help reduce swelling and ease pain. They also contain other constituents like tannins, alkaloids, and glycosides that have antispasmodic and antacid effects, further contributing to their pain-relieving properties.
